note_1_company_description.summary: LLC established in CA on Oct 17, 2024 (note: Item 1 says Oct 21, 2024 — minor discrepancy) for franchise opportunities. Provides rights to operate Delah Coffee shops under the mark. Offers individual and area development franchises.

b_cash_equivalents.policy: Highly liquid debt instruments with original maturity of 3 months or less

c_federal_income_taxes.policy: LLC is disregarded entity for tax purposes. Accounts included in members' tax return. No tax liability recorded.

d_use_of_estimates.policy: Standard management estimates disclosure. Actual results could differ.

e_concentration_of_credit_risk.policy: Cash with major financial institutions. FDIC insurance limit $250,000. Mitigated by using high credit rating institutions.
e_concentration_of_credit_risk.fdic_exposure: Not exceeded as of Jan 2, 2025 (only $500 on deposit)

f_revenue_recognition.standard: ASC 606 with ASU 2021-02 practical expedient for franchisors
f_revenue_recognition.obligation_1: Pre-opening services (site selection, manuals, initial training) — recognized using input method over completion period
f_revenue_recognition.obligation_2: Franchise license access — recognized straight-line over 10-year FA term
f_revenue_recognition.variable_consideration: Royalty and BDF fees based on franchisee sales — recognized as delivered
f_revenue_recognition.contract_assets_liabilities: Direct contract costs capitalized per ASC 606 and recognized over FA term. Deferred revenue for initial franchise fees amortized over FA life.
f_revenue_recognition.revenue_generated: None as of balance sheet date

g_recent_accounting_pronouncements.impact: No long-term leases; no ROU assets or lease liabilities required

accounting_policies_not_applicable: Related party transactions — none disclosed (though affiliate structure exists, the franchisor entity had no transactions)
Advertising fund accounting — no fund established
observations: Formation date discrepancy: Note 1 says Oct 17, 2024; Item 1 says Oct 21, 2024
Revenue recognition policy is fully articulated despite zero revenue — appropriate for FDD
Financial statements are the absolute minimum required by FTC Franchise Rule
No income statement or cash flow because no operations occurred
Going concern evaluation language present in auditor report but no qualification issued
